treatment_events.name: nyc_rat_containerization_2023_pilot
treatment_events.description: NYC Department of Sanitation mandatory-containerization rollout. Pilot phase launched in lower Manhattan (community districts MN 01-09) on 2023-07-01; citywide commercial-corridor enforcement began 2024-03-01 and expanded to residential buildings >30 units on 2024-07-01.

provenance.data_source: NYC Open Data — 311 Service Requests (Socrata erm2-nwe9)
provenance.creator: nyc311.temporal.PanelDataset
